headline: Amcor’s new North American flexibles president talks growth
summary: The business plans to accelerate investments in the North American footprint, according to new leader Scott Fallon.

raw.headline: Amcor’s new North American flexibles president talks growth
raw.summary: The business plans to accelerate investments in the North American footprint, according to new leader Scott Fallon.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Amcor, Raises Price Target to $43
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Gabe Hajde   maintains Amcor (NYSE:AMCR) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $41 to $43.
